analysis.consistency: The data appears consistent with standard D&D 5e spell formatting and mechanics. Spell components, casting time, range, and level align correctly.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is detailed, including the 'At Higher Levels' scaling feature. The mechanical outcomes (Dexterity save, fire damage) are clearly defined.

mechanics.casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take in response to being damaged by a creature within 60 feet of you that you can see
mechanics.effect_summary: Deals 2d10 fire damage to a creature that just damaged the caster, requiring a Dexterity saving throw for half damage.
mechanics.scaling: Damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 1st.
